events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Wellington, with Hurley in charge pending presentation of his letter of credence.

evidence.quote: Note: The Legation in Wellington had been established on April 1, 1942, with Hurley in charge pending presentation of his letter of credence.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated from Legation to Embassy; Scotten promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials on this date.

evidence.quote: Robert Mcgregor Scotten, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1947-12-18. Credentials presented: 1948-04-07. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1948-12-22.
